twitter_thread: 60% of pro gamers use a mouse with a sensor from 2018 or earlier, costing them 12% in aim accuracy.
Logitech's G3 series mouse jumps to 25,600 CPI, a 40% increase over the previous model.
Omron switches last 50 million clicks, while Kailh switches last 80 million: which do you prioritize?
Adding 10g of weight to a mouse can reduce hand fatigue by 8% in marathon gaming sessions.
Mice with report rates below 500Hz can add up to 4ms of input lag, making them unsuitable for FPS games.
A $5 braided cable can extend a mouse's lifespan by 2 years, justifying the extra cost.
What's the one mouse feature you can't compromise on? #gamingmouse #gears
pack.linkedin: Logitech's G3 series boasts a 25,600 CPI optical sensor, up 40% from the previous model. Customizable weights can also improve performance, with 10g of added weight reducing hand fatigue by 8%. However, report rates below 500Hz can add up to 4ms of input lag.
